hero.stripText: Free shipping over $300 · 14-day size exchange · new arrivals weekly
hero.headline: Modern sneakers with premium finish and easy everyday wear.
hero.description: Explore a tighter edit of standout pairs, from clean runners to bold statement styles. Every product page includes clear sizing, delivery timing, and saved-item support.

featuredDrop.fallbackBody: A new premium pair is arriving soon. Stay tuned for the next release.

trust.headline: Designed to feel clear, calm, and premium from the first click.

items.title: Curated Selection
items.body: A focused edit of modern runners, low tops, and statement pairs chosen for style, comfort, and everyday wear.

items.title: Clear Delivery
items.body: Shipping timelines are easy to understand, with express options available at checkout for the pairs that need to arrive fast.

items.title: Easy Support
items.body: Size guidance, saved items, and simple post-purchase support make the store feel calm, helpful, and easy to trust.

items.question: How long does shipping take?
items.answer: Standard delivery usually arrives in 2 to 4 business days. Express delivery is available at checkout for faster dispatch.

items.question: Can I exchange for another size?
items.answer: Yes. Eligible pairs include a 14-day size exchange so you can shop with more confidence.

items.question: Can I save styles for later?
items.answer: Yes. Tap the heart on any product card to save it and review it later in your account area.

items.question: What comes with each order?
items.answer: Every order includes secure packaging, order tracking, and simple support if you need help after delivery.

cta.headline: Clean silhouettes, fast delivery, and easy size support across the full collection.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.message: Standard delivery arrives in 2-4 business days, with express dispatch available at checkout.

returns.title: Returns
returns.message: Need a different size? Eligible pairs include a 14-day size exchange window.
